Metadata.title: Mohammad Hajeer | Software Engineer
Metadata.description: Full-Stack Software Engineer & CS Graduate. I build scalable web applications from the ground up — clean APIs, performant frontends, and solid infrastructure.
Metadata.ogDescription: Explore Mohammad Hajeer's portfolio. Software Engineer specializing in Next.js, React, Node.js, and modern full-stack web development.

Hero.name: Mohammad Hajeer
Hero.title: Software Engineer · Full-Stack Web Developer · CS Graduate
Hero.intro: I build scalable web applications from the ground up — clean APIs, performant frontends, and solid infrastructure. Turning ideas into production-ready products with precision.

About.heading: Building things that matter
paragraphs: Computer Science graduate with a strong foundation in algorithms, systems design, and software engineering principles. I specialize in crafting end-to-end web solutions that balance technical rigor with clean UX.
Whether architecting a database schema or fine-tuning a React component, I care about the craft at every layer of the stack.

items.title: ASL Learning & Translation Platform
items.desc: Built full-stack platform with Laravel and React (TS), implementing multi-role RBAC; integrated MediaPipe ASL translator with responsive UI; built gamified dashboard with points, PDF certs, and real-time chat using Pusher & MUI Charts.

items.title: Quran Progress Tracker
items.desc: Built full-stack Quran memorization tracker with Next.js and Appwrite, featuring multi-role RBAC; daily memorization & revision tracker with history and interactive charts using shadcn/ui; teacher dashboard for viewing students’ progress and notifications.

items.title: Smart Attendance System (IoT-based)
items.desc: Built IoT attendance system using Arduino IDE & ESP8266 with React frontend and Node.js backend; developed backend API with Node.js and SQLite to store/manage student attendance records; implemented real-time tracking via WebSockets.

Workflow.heading: From idea to production
Workflow.subheading: A structured pipeline that turns rough concepts into polished, maintained products.

Contact.heading: Let's build together
Contact.subheading: Open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and interesting collaborations.
